since_last: 26% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.40%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 26% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.14% · BTC -1.49% · Gold -1.65% · Nasdaq100 -0.54%. 26% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.40%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.40%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.64%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -7.52%
cards.body: Leaders: PUBM +4.98%, NOW +4.95%, SKHY +2.98%, WDAY +1.57%, INTU +1.25%. Laggards: TSLA -7.52%, GOOGL -5.16%, SYNA -3.78%, LEU -3.60%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.15% at $115.09
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.15% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
